titleStmt.title: SII 16.328: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 328. (A.R. No. 502 of 1919.) LITTLE KĀÑCHĪPURAM, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west verandah round the rock of Aruḷāḷaperumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1564, Chitrabhānu, Vaiśākha ba. 30, corresponding to 1648 A.D., May 18, (Wednesday).

It records the gift of the village Muśuli as tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam by Tammappa-nāyaḍu, son of Pāvaḍa China-Kṛishṇappa-nāyaḍu and grandson of Tammi-nāyaḍu for conducting the Rōhiṇī-mahōtsavaṁ every month to god Varadarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1564 Agunēṭi citrabhānu saṁ vatsara vaiśākha ba 30 śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa vīraveṁkaṭapati dēva mahārāyalu
ghanagirinagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanādhirūḍhulai pṛthivi sāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁnuṁḍagānu kariśikhariśikhāmadhyamadhyānusīnulaina śrīvaradarājasvāmi rōhiṇimahōtsava kaiṁkaryānaku
tammināyani pautrulaina pāvaḍa cinakṛṣṇappanāyani putrulaina tiṁmappanāyaḍu samarpiṁcina muśuli grāmaṁ tiruvaḷyāvaṭṭaṁgā śēsukoni pratimāsamaṁdali pratirōhiṇi yaṁdunnu mahōtsavaṁ
Acaṁdrārkastāyigā kona navadhariṁcagalavāru yiṁdulaku kōvilalō naḍicekramaṁ Appapaḍi Okaṭi vaḍapaḍi Okaṭi daddhiyōdanapaḍi Okaṭi magiyanpaḍi Okaṭi dōśapaḷlu reṁḍu
dadyōdanaṁ kalimeḍu puḷiyōgira kalimeḍu vemaruṁḍalu nālugu venna padahāru cē(śē)rlu cakkare vīśelu reṁḍu yeḷanīrlu yāṁbhai caṁdanaṁ phalaṁ paḍi vakkalu palālu yāṁbhayi
tellanākulu vēyi vasaṁtānaku maṁcinūna mūḍugalālu diviṭi camaru Āru tūmu sāmrāṇi pa 4 Ārtikarpūraṁ pa 4 tirumaṁjanadravyaṁ pa 4 yī voppaṁdaṁ naḍicēdi .
Digital edition of SII 16.328 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
